positive: A stylized, minimal illustration of a soaring crescent moon and constellations, surrounded by swirling cosmic nebulae and stylized shooting stars. The overall style should be highly sophisticated, resembling elegant single-line continuous art combined with deep watercolor washes. Use a limited, celestial color palette of deep indigo, ethereal lavender, shimmering gold, and teal accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and circular, designed to be a strong, high-contrast silhouette print. The lines should be crisp and fluid, conveying a magical, dreamy atmosphere. Ideal for apparel graphic print.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, cartoon, signature, noisy, artifacts, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, jpeg artifacts, bokeh
